violations.description: Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Wash water for mechanical warewash machine was not maintained at proper temperature. -Water temp did not reach 120F.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors in kitchen need more thorough cleaning.
Clean, proper temperature, cleaning agent (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
